title: Weather forecast for Monday 17 June
description: GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - The weather on...
bodyText:
GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - The weather on Monday 17 June looks to be warmer with sunshine and patchy clouds.

Extremely high fire danger conditions are expected over the Central Karoo (Western Cape) tomorrow.


> Here is the latest weather forecast for the Garden Route and Karoo from Weather SA:


Fine and warmer, but partly cloudy along the coast. A moderate to strong northerly wind is expected becoming moderate north-westerly in the afternoon.

The expected UVB sunburn index: Moderate.


> Weather forecast Monday:

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
